title.en: 'Animals', Hand of God and Beckham - Argentina and England's World Cup rivalry
title.zh-CN: “动物” ，上帝之手和贝克汉姆-阿根廷和英格兰的世界杯对抗

summary.en: As England and Argentina prepare to go head-to-head in Wednesday's World Cup semi-final, BBC Sport looks at their footballing rivalry.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰和阿根廷准备在周三的世界杯半决赛中正面交锋， BBC Sport着眼于他们的足球竞争。

title.en: Bellingham reaching heights of World Cup legends with Messi next
title.zh-CN: 贝灵厄姆与梅西一起攀登世界杯传奇高峰

summary.en: Jude Bellingham again dazzles England and the World Cup with his brilliance, matching some records of the all-time greats.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝林汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）再次以他的辉煌让英格兰和世界杯眼花缭乱，与一些历史上伟大的纪录相匹配。

title.en: Embolo sent off as result of mistaken identity rule
title.zh-CN: 由于错误的身份规则而发送的栓塞

summary.en: Switzerland's Breel Embolo becomes first player to be sent off as a result of a new law for mistaken identity at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 瑞士的Breel Embolo成为第一个因世界杯错误身份而被罚下场的球员。

title.en: Did ball hit spidercam before England goal? Snicko says not - Norway unsure
title.zh-CN: 球是否在英格兰进球前击中了蜘蛛摄像头？ Snicko说不-挪威不确定

summary.en: Norway's World Cup campaign ends in a quarter-final defeat by England, but they leave frustrated, arguing that Jude Bellingham's equaliser should not have counted.
summary.zh-CN: 挪威的世界杯战役以英格兰四分之一决赛的失利告终，但他们感到沮丧，认为裘德·贝林汉姆的扳平比分不应该算在内。

title.en: Bellingham scores extra-time winner as England reach semi-finals
title.zh-CN: 随着英格兰队进入半决赛，贝灵厄姆队获得了加时赛冠军

summary.en: Jude Bellingham scores twice, including an extra-time winner, as England come from behind to beat Norway 2-1 in Miami to reach the World Cup semi-finals.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝灵汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）得分两次，其中包括一名加时赛冠军，因为英格兰队在迈阿密以2比1击败挪威队进入世界杯半决赛。

title.en: Argentina set up England semi-final with extra-time victory over Switzerland
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷组建英格兰半决赛，加时赛战胜瑞士

summary.en: Argentina set up a World Cup semi-final with England after scoring twice in extra-time to beat 10-man Switzerland 3-1 in Kansas City.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷在加时赛中得分两次，在堪萨斯城以3比1击败10人瑞士队，与英格兰队进入世界杯半决赛。

title.en: Did spider cam impact England's opener?
title.zh-CN: 蜘蛛凸轮是否影响了英格兰的揭幕战？

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Wayne Rooney, Ellen White and Micah Richards look at whether the spider cam had an impact in Jude Bellingham's first goal for England against Norway.
summary.zh-CN: BBC体育世界杯专家韦恩·鲁尼（ Wayne Rooney ）、艾伦·怀特（ Ellen White ）和米卡·理查兹（ Micah Richards ）着眼于蜘蛛凸轮是否对裘德·贝灵汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）

title.en: Alvarez's stunning strike gives Argentina lead against 10-man Switzerland
title.zh-CN: 阿尔瓦雷斯的惊人罢工让阿根廷队在对阵10名瑞士队的比赛中领先

summary.en: Argentina retake the lead in their quarter-final against Switzerland through a stunning strike from Julian Alvarez during extra-time in Kansas City.
summary.zh-CN: 通过朱利安·阿尔瓦雷斯在堪萨斯城加时赛期间的惊人罢工，阿根廷在对阵瑞士的四分之一决赛中夺回了领先优势。

title.en: Top four ranked teams make semi-finals for first time
title.zh-CN: 排名前四的球队首次进入半决赛

summary.en: For the first time since there have been Fifa rankings the top four ranked teams have made the semi-final of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 自国际足联排名以来，排名前四的球队首次进入世界杯半决赛。

title.en: England 'got lucky' with disallowed goal
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队“很幸运” ，不允许进球

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Wayne Rooney and Ellen White believe England "got lucky" after Torbjorn Heggem's second-half goal was ruled out for a foul on Elliott Anderson by Erling Haaland.
summary.zh-CN: BBC体育世界杯专家韦恩·鲁尼（ Wayne Rooney ）和艾伦·怀特（ Ellen White ）认为，在托比约恩·黑格姆（ Torbjorn Heggem ）的下半场进球因埃利奥特·安德森（ Elliott Anderson ）被埃林·哈兰德（ Erling Haaland ）犯规

title.en: Merson: Teams win leagues, X-factor wins World Cups - and Bellingham has it
title.zh-CN: 默森：球队赢得联赛， X因素赢得世界杯-贝灵汉拥有它

summary.en: Paul Merson says Jude Bellingham has the X-factor needed to help England win the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: Paul Merson说， Jude Bellingham拥有帮助英格兰赢得世界杯所需的X因素。

title.en: Alvarez scores extra-time stunner as Argentina set up blockbuster semi vs England
title.zh-CN: 阿尔瓦雷斯在阿根廷与英格兰的比赛中取得了加时赛得分

summary.en: Julian Alvarez scored an extra-time stunner as Argentina beat 10-man Switzerland 3-1 and set up a mouth-watering World Cup semi-final clash with England.
summary.zh-CN: 朱利安·阿尔瓦雷斯（ Julian Alvarez ）获得了一名加时赛击球手，阿根廷以3比1击败10人瑞士队，并与英格兰队进行了一场令人垂涎的世界杯半决赛。

title.en: Jude Bellingham excels in parallel World Cup but cannot win trophy alone | Barney Ronay
title.zh-CN: Jude Bellingham擅长平行世界杯，但不能独自赢得奖杯| Barney Ronay

summary.en: Up against Norway’s heart and skill and Florida’s heat, talisman got England through – but there is much to fixJude against the sun. For much of this game there was a feeling of three separate...
summary.zh-CN: 面对挪威的心脏和技巧以及佛罗里达的炎热，护身符让英格兰度过了难关–但还有很多事情要解决犹太人对抗太阳的问题。在这场比赛的大部分时间里，有三种不同的感觉……

title.en: Julián Álvarez’s extra-time stunner sinks 10-man Switzerland to send Argentina into semi-finals
title.zh-CN: 朱利安·阿尔瓦雷斯（ Julián Álvarez ）的加时赛击败10人瑞士队，将阿根廷队送入半决赛

summary.en: Did anyone think they would do it the easy way? If Argentina are to win this World Cup they will only get there via rollercoaster. A seemingly straightforward night’s work against Switzerland became...
summary.zh-CN: 有没有人认为他们会以简单的方式做到这一点？如果阿根廷要赢得这届世界杯，他们只能通过过山车到达那里。一个看似简单的夜晚对抗瑞士的工作变成了……

summary.en: The head of Fifa's disciplinary committee refuses to answer BBC questions about the decision-making process which led to United States striker Folarin Balogun avoiding a ban after being sent off.

summary.en: Jude Bellingham scores his second goal of the game to give England a 2-1 lead over Norway during extra time of their 2026 World Cup quarter-final in Miami.

summary.en: As England gear up to face Norway at the Miami Stadium for the World Cup quarter-finals, re-live all the goals that got Thomas Tuchel's side there.

summary.en: Spain claim the Uefa Men's Under-19 Championship for the 10th time with a 2-0 victory over Germany at Wrexham's Racecourse Ground.

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Cesar Azpilicueta and Wayne Rooney look at how Lamine Yamal performed against Belgium and feel there is "more to come" from the Spain forward.
